name: iobroker.heishamon
description: ioBroker adapter for Panasonic Aquarea heat pumps. Talks the CN-CNT protocol directly over a serial line (RS232 levels at the heat pump; optional RS232/RS485 converter for long cable runs) — no HeishaMon/MQTT hop required.
author: Tobias Hanss <tobias.hanss@atcetera.de>
